title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIT Kanpur

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIT Kanpur
jsonLd.description:
IIT Kanpur, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Faridabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Kanpur:
IIT Kanpur is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Kanpur!
